article_new.title: $2B legal action against Rightmove gains new participant
article_new.lead: AIM Group reports that a major UK estate agency chain has joined the existing class-action against Rightmove, bringing the total financial claim to approximately $2 billion. The new claimant, which operates 340 branches across England and Wales, filed to join the Hausfeld-managed case. This is the same litigation originally reported as a £1.5B action.

corpus.title: Rightmove Sued for £1.5 Billion by UK Estate Agent Coalition
corpus.lead: A coalition of UK estate agencies has filed a £1.5 billion class-action lawsuit against Rightmove, alleging the portal abused its market-dominant position to impose excessive subscription fees. The claimants represent approximately 4,000 agencies. The case is being handled by competition law specialist Hausfeld.

corpus.title: Rightmove introduces new three-tier subscription model for estate agencies
corpus.lead: Rightmove has unveiled a redesigned subscription structure replacing the flat monthly fee with three tiers: Essential, Professional, and Enterprise. The Enterprise tier at £2,400 per month includes priority placement and AI market appraisal.

corpus.title: French Portal Rivalry Intensifies as Bien'ici, SeLoger, and Leboncoin Trade Claims
corpus.lead: France's real estate portals are engaged in a public dispute over traffic rankings and lead quality. SeLoger published data claiming lead quality advantages, while Leboncoin accused both of inflating traffic figures.

corpus.title: Czech Regulator Forces Sreality Subscription Price Cut After Abuse of Dominance Ruling
corpus.lead: Czech competition authority ruled that Sreality must reduce real estate agency subscription prices by 35% within 90 days after finding it charged supra-competitive rates.

article_new.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
article_new.lead: Zillow launched an AI-powered search assistant allowing homebuyers to describe preferences in natural language. The assistant parses requests and surfaces listings without manual filter adjustments. The feature is in beta for 10% of users.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Launches Transformative AI Experience on Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar Group unveiled a redesigned Homes.com powered by generative AI for natural language property search. CEO Andy Florance said the launch marks 'the end of filter-based search as the primary discovery mechanism'.

corpus.title: Home search is going AI-first with Realtor.com
corpus.lead: Realtor.com overhauled its core search experience making AI intent parsing the primary mechanism. A conversational interface replaces the filter panel, supplemented by a native ChatGPT plugin.

corpus.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview to bring pre-market home listings into the open
corpus.lead: Zillow introduced Zillow Preview, a new listing category for pre-market properties excluded from third-party syndication. Participating brokerages can opt-in sellers starting April 1.

corpus.title: Product and Services Roundup: ChatGPT Additions for Rightmove, Idealista and HepsiEmlak
corpus.lead: Three major real estate portals rolled out ChatGPT-powered chatbots within a two-week window, allowing buyers to ask property questions in natural language.

article_new.title: Zillow Preview gains rapid momentum as dozens of new brokerages sign on
article_new.lead: More than 60 brokerage firms have joined the Zillow Preview program since the March launch. Preview listings have generated 2.3x more saves per view than standard listings in participating markets.

corpus.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview to bring pre-market home listings into the open
corpus.lead: Zillow introduced Zillow Preview, a new listing category that allows sellers to test market interest before officially listing. Properties are visible to shoppers but excluded from third-party syndication.

corpus.title: Homes.com Expands Pre-Market Listings Program Nationwide
corpus.lead: Homes.com extended its pre-market listing feature to all 50 US states. The program allows sellers to list as 'coming soon' and receive buyer inquiries before the home appears on the MLS.

corpus.title: Compass touts record revenue as private listing strategy drives growth
corpus.lead: Compass reported Q1 2026 revenue of $1.45B, up 18% YoY. Private listings account for 12% of transaction volume with 40% lower days-on-market than MLS listings.

article_new.title: CoStar Accuses Zillow of Ongoing IP Infringement in Expanded Amended Complaint
article_new.lead: CoStar filed an amended lawsuit against Zillow expanding IP infringement claims to include 9,000 additional property photographs and data allegedly copied from LoopNet.

corpus.title: CoStar files intellectual property suit against Zillow over listing photographs
corpus.lead: CoStar Group filed a copyright infringement lawsuit against Zillow in federal court, claiming Zillow used CoStar-owned property photographs on its platform without authorization. CoStar is seeking $150M in damages.

corpus.title: Scout24 acquires Spanish online real estate platforms Fotocasa and Habitaclia
corpus.lead: Scout24 has agreed to acquire Fotocasa and Habitaclia from Adevinta for €620M. The deal gives Scout24 a leading position in the Spanish market.

corpus.title: NWMLS files federal lawsuit against Compass over pocket listing practices
corpus.lead: Northwest Multiple Listing Service filed a federal lawsuit against Compass alleging systematic withholding of properties from the MLS to favour internal transactions.

article_new.title: How Zillow spent 20 years teaching AI to understand home value
article_new.lead: Zillow's Zestimate team published a retrospective on building their AI valuation model, describing how 20 years of transaction data and property attributes trained the model to predict home values within 2.4% of sale price. The piece discusses transformer architectures and computer vision for exterior condition scoring.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI-powered search assistant allowing homebuyers to describe what they want in natural language. The assistant surfaces listings without manual filter adjustments.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Launches Transformative AI Experience on Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar Group unveiled a redesigned Homes.com powered by generative AI. The system can answer questions about neighborhoods and commute times directly from the search interface.

corpus.title: New data shows AI search adoption by homebuyers climbing fast
corpus.lead: A survey of 2,400 US homebuyers found 38% used an AI-assisted search tool during their most recent purchase, up from 11% in 2024. Natural language search was rated significantly less frustrating.

article_new.title: Realtor.com launches AI property search assistant — 'Ask Realtor'
article_new.lead: Realtor.com has launched 'Ask Realtor', an AI chat interface that allows buyers to search in natural language. The feature is powered by a fine-tuned language model and is available to all users on web and mobile as of April 4.

corpus.title: Home search is going AI-first with Realtor.com as attention gets harder to earn
corpus.lead: Realtor.com has completely overhauled its core search experience with AI intent parsing as the primary mechanism. The platform simultaneously launched a native ChatGPT plugin for property search.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI-powered search assistant allowing buyers to describe preferences in natural language. Available to 10% of users in beta.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Launches Transformative AI Experience on Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar's Homes.com redesigned with generative AI for natural language property search. Andy Florance: 'the end of filter-based search'.

article_new.title: OpenSooq: Building vertical depth from regionwide horizontal footprint
article_new.lead: AIM Group profiles OpenSooq, the MENA classifieds platform, on its strategy to build category-specific features within its horizontal marketplace. OpenSooq is adding property condition verification and seller identity checks in its real estate vertical.

corpus.title: Dubizzle Group: From classifieds to property transactions in MENA
corpus.lead: Dubizzle launched a full-service property transaction product in Dubai enabling end-to-end transaction completion. The company processed 200+ complete transactions in pilot with NPS of 68.

corpus.title: Property Finder raises $400M, bets on product depth not geographic expansion
corpus.lead: Property Finder closed a $400M growth equity round. CEO says capital goes to verified listings, AI valuation, and mortgage integrations rather than new geographies.

corpus.title: Avito Adtech expands analytics for sellers
corpus.lead: Avito launched an expanded analytics dashboard for advertising clients with real-time impression and conversion data. Includes self-serve campaign management.

article_new.title: Realtor.com's AI-powered home search: a product deep dive
article_new.lead: A detailed look at Realtor.com's new conversational search product, including the technical architecture, training data approach, and user research that informed the redesign. The article includes screenshots of the new UI and quotes from the product team.

corpus.title: Home search is going AI-first with Realtor.com as attention gets harder to earn
corpus.lead: Realtor.com has completely overhauled its core search experience. AI intent parsing replaces the filter panel. ChatGPT plugin launched simultaneously.

corpus.title: Realtor.com launches AI property search assistant — 'Ask Realtor'
corpus.lead: Realtor.com launched 'Ask Realtor', an AI chat interface for natural language property search, powered by a fine-tuned language model.

corpus.title: New data shows AI search adoption by homebuyers climbing fast
corpus.lead: Survey of 2,400 US homebuyers: 38% used AI-assisted search, up from 11% in 2024. Buyers submitted offers 6 days faster with AI search.

article_new.title: Scout24 completes acquisition of Fotocasa and Habitaclia — integration begins
article_new.lead: Scout24 announced the regulatory approval and completion of its acquisition of Fotocasa and Habitaclia. Integration of technology teams begins immediately; commercial operations remain separate for the initial six-month period. CEO Hartmann: 'Day one of building Spain's leading digital real estate platform'.

corpus.title: Scout24 acquires Spanish online real estate platforms Fotocasa and Habitaclia
corpus.lead: Scout24 agreed to acquire Fotocasa and Habitaclia from Adevinta for €620M, extending its European footprint into Spain. Expected close Q3 2026 pending EU approval.

corpus.title: Opendoor acquires Doma's closing, escrow and title technology stack
corpus.lead: Opendoor completed acquisition of Doma's technology assets for ~$150M, gaining end-to-end transaction capability.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Completes Acquisition of Visual Lease for $272 Million
corpus.lead: CoStar completed its $272M acquisition of Visual Lease, a lease accounting software company serving 1,500+ corporate clients.

article_new.title: Лифт в недвижимость: как Авито трансформирует покупку жилья
article_new.lead: Российское деловое издание публикует обзорную статью о цифровизации рынка недвижимости в России, фокусируясь на роли Авито как крупнейшего агрегатора объявлений. Статья описывает функции AI-поиска, введённые в 2025 году, и приводит данные об объёме листингов.

corpus.title: Avito Adtech expands analytics for sellers
corpus.lead: Avito launched expanded analytics dashboard with real-time impression and conversion data for advertising clients. Includes self-serve campaign management interface.

corpus.title: Avito Jobs launches branded vacancy ads
corpus.lead: Avito introduced a premium branded vacancy format for employers with corporate branding elements. 240 employers adopted in first 30 days; 2.1x more applications per view.

corpus.title: Home search is going AI-first with Realtor.com
corpus.lead: Realtor.com overhauled core search with AI intent parsing replacing filter panel. ChatGPT plugin launched simultaneously.

article_new.title: Zillow eyes expansion into rental long-term lease management with new product
article_new.lead: Zillow announced a new product allowing landlords to manage long-term leases, rent collection, and maintenance requests directly through the Zillow platform. The product targets individual landlords with 1-10 properties. Free tier available; premium tier at $29/month includes rent guarantee insurance.

corpus.title: How AI is transforming the rental application process
corpus.lead: Proptech startups deploying AI for rental application automation including income verification and tenant matching. RentSpree's smart queue ranks applicants by likelihood of successful tenancy.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI search assistant for homebuyers. Available to 10% of users in beta.

corpus.title: Apartments.com Releases Multifamily Rent Growth Report for March 2026
corpus.lead: US rental price growth decelerated to 1.2% year-over-year nationally. Sun Belt markets showed sharpest declines.

article_new.title: Avito Недвижимость запустила AI-подбор объявлений по описанию
article_new.lead: Авито Недвижимость запустила функцию поиска объявлений по текстовому описанию на естественном языке. Пользователь описывает желаемое жильё, система возвращает подборку объявлений без ручного указания фильтров. Функция доступна в мобильном приложении с версии 12.4.

corpus.title: Home search is going AI-first with Realtor.com
corpus.lead: Realtor.com overhauled core search with AI intent parsing. The filter panel has been removed as the primary entry point.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI search assistant for natural language property search in beta.

corpus.title: Avito Adtech expands analytics for sellers
corpus.lead: Avito launched expanded analytics dashboard with real-time data for advertising clients.

article_new.title: Rightmove Q1 2026 Trading Update: Revenue up 8%, No Comment on Lawsuit
article_new.lead: Rightmove published its Q1 2026 trading update showing revenue growth of 8% year-on-year and average revenue per advertiser up 11%. The company declined to comment on the pending class-action lawsuit beyond noting it is 'being defended vigorously'.

corpus.title: Rightmove Sued for £1.5 Billion by UK Estate Agent Coalition
corpus.lead: A coalition of UK estate agencies filed a £1.5B class-action against Rightmove for abusive subscription pricing. 4,000 agencies represented by Hausfeld.

corpus.title: $2B legal action against Rightmove gains new participant
corpus.lead: A major UK estate agency chain joined the existing class-action against Rightmove, bringing the total claim to approximately $2B.

corpus.title: Rightmove introduces new three-tier subscription model for estate agencies
corpus.lead: Rightmove unveiled Essential, Professional, and Enterprise subscription tiers replacing its flat fee structure.

article_new.title: Lofty AI raises $30M Series B to expand AI real estate CRM
article_new.lead: Lofty (formerly Chime Technologies) announced a $30 million Series B funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz to accelerate development of its AI-powered real estate CRM platform. The company will use funds to expand its enterprise offering and launch international markets.

corpus.title: Lofty AI launches end-to-end real estate CRM with full AI pipeline automation
corpus.lead: Lofty released a completely rebuilt CRM platform with AI agents automating follow-ups, offer letters, and pipeline scoring. Pricing starts at $499/month per agent.

corpus.title: Property Finder raises $400M, bets on product depth not geographic expansion
corpus.lead: Property Finder closed a $400M growth equity round. Capital going to verified listings and AI valuation tools.

corpus.title: Opendoor acquires Doma's closing, escrow and title technology stack
corpus.lead: Opendoor completed $150M acquisition of Doma's technology assets for end-to-end transaction capability.

article_new.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview: что это значит для рынка недвижимости
article_new.lead: Российское издание Novostroy публикует разбор запуска Zillow Preview, описывая новую концепцию pre-market листингов и рассуждая о том, возможна ли подобная модель на российском рынке. Статья ссылается на оригинальный пресс-релиз Zillow.

corpus.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview to bring pre-market home listings into the open
corpus.lead: Zillow introduced Zillow Preview, a new listing category for pre-market properties. Visible to buyers but excluded from third-party syndication.

corpus.title: Homes.com Expands Pre-Market Listings Program Nationwide
corpus.lead: Homes.com extended its pre-market listing feature to all 50 US states after a six-month pilot.

corpus.title: Zillow Preview gains rapid momentum as dozens of new brokerages sign on
corpus.lead: More than 60 brokerage firms joined Zillow Preview since March launch. Preview listings generating 2.3x more saves per view.
